unstructured_customer_notes: Standard install. Customer mentioned they have a long driveway approx 40m. Rear access only, use side gate code 4821.
Wayleave issue on neighbouring land not yet resolved. Exchange visit needed. Duct route passes through basement - low ceiling approx 1.4m. Contact site manager Dave on 07700 900123 before attending.

Customer called to say they are on holiday until 10th April. DO NOT ATTEND before then. Large dog in back garden - must be secured before engineer arrives. Notes say customer only available mornings before 12.

Multi-storey office block. Fibre route goes up external wall to 3rd floor. Will need cherry picker or scaffolding. Building manager must grant roof access 48hrs in advance. Previous attempt failed - wrong cable length ordered.

Intermittent connection dropping. Customer reports issue worse in evenings. Router reboot does not fix. Suspect damaged drop cable from pole. Customer works from home - prefers afternoon slot after 2pm.
Cannot find chamber cover - may be under customer's new patio. Customer aware and says they will lift slabs before visit. Access via narrow alleyway, van cannot park within 50m.

Data centre install. Must wear full anti-static PPE. Raised floor cable routing. Security clearance required - engineer must bring photo ID and confirmation email ref DC-2026-445. Customer contact is night shift only available between 10pm and 6am.
Straightforward install. Customer has cleared route from pole to house. Photo shows clear path. No obstructions noted. Available any day, any time.

Customer reports no broadband for 3 days. Two large dogs on property - customer says they will keep them inside. Previous engineer noted damaged cable at joint box 200m from property. Need cable jointing kit.

Cease and recovery of equipment at customer premises. Must recover ONT and patch panel. Building being demolished in 3 weeks so access may become restricted. Asbestos survey flagged on floor 2 - do not access without clearance.
Customer wants to delay until new extension is built. Builder says ready mid-April at earliest. Customer asked us to call back on 0771 234 5678 to confirm date. DO NOT book until customer confirms.

Industrial estate. Duct blockage found on previous survey. May need new duct bore approx 30m. Guard dog reported by survey engineer. Site only accessible Mon to Fri 8am to 4pm. Overhead power lines near proposed route - must maintain safe clearance.

Customer elderly and hard of hearing. Please knock loudly and wait. Fault traced to external connection point. May need to replace connection point housing. Customer daughter is point of contact on 07700 112233 - call her when on way.

Rural property. Long garden run approx 80m from pole. Customer has two friendly dogs but they are not secured. Underground route preferred as overhead not feasible. Customer available weekdays only 9-5. Noted mole damage along proposed route.
